role_summary: the external auditor provides independent assurance on the accuracy and fairness of  financial statements.
responsibilities: • conduct statutory and external audits   • verify financi al records and supporting documents   • test internal controls and compliance   • identify misstatements and audit risks   • prepare audit documentation and reports   • communicate audit findings to stakeholders
qualifications: • qualified chartered accountant   • strong accounting and auditing standards knowledge   • professional skepticism and integrity
